defaultPrompts.capabilities: What can you do for me?

selectAssistantHint: Select an assistant to start a task

analyze.descriptionGeneral: Identify key points and suggest next steps
analyze.descriptionProject: Review the structure and suggest next steps
analyze.templateGeneral: Analyze the content I provide next, identify the key points, and suggest the next steps.
analyze.templateProject: Analyze the current project, review its structure, key modules, and current state, then suggest the next steps.

fix.title: Fix an issue
fix.descriptionGeneral: Find the cause from an error and propose a fix
fix.descriptionProject: Find and fix the cause of an error
fix.templateGeneral: Use the error or behavior I provide next to identify the cause and propose a fix.
fix.templateProject: Use the error I provide to find the root cause in the current project and implement a fix.

modifyUi.title: Modify the UI
modifyUi.descriptionGeneral: Adjust UI content and styling from a description
modifyUi.descriptionProject: Adjust the current project's UI from a description
modifyUi.templateGeneral: Use the description I provide next to adjust the UI content and styling.
modifyUi.templateProject: Adjust the current project's UI based on my description while following its existing design conventions.

organize.title: Organize files
organize.descriptionGeneral: Group files and identify duplicate content
organize.descriptionProject: Group files and clean up duplicate content
organize.templateGeneral: Help me group the specified files and identify duplicate content that can be removed.
organize.templateProject: Organize the current project's file structure, group related files, and clean up duplicate content.
